message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="team-lead" summary="Status check on document finalization">
Marty, the full team is idle and waiting on you to finalize the documents. Are you currently updating the files with the agreed feedback? Please let me know your status.
</teammate-message>

input.content:
The documents are already finalized. I completed all updates several rounds ago. There is nothing left for me to do on the documents -- they are ready for you to review and present PROJECT.md to the project owner for scope approval.

To be explicit: all 6 feedback items have been incorporated:
1. Heydon's a11y criteria -- DONE (Accessibility sections added to all 8 stories)
2. Lea's oldest-first inbox + duplicate input note + drop @office -- DONE
3. Kent's clarify sub-stories + implementation order -- DONE (13-step order with interleaved clarify)
4. Steve Schoger's drop @office -- DONE (5 default contexts)
5. Carson's header nav + clarify pattern -- DONE
6. Scott's migration to NextAction -- DONE

The ball is in your court. Please review the files and present to the owner.
input.summary: Documents already finalized, waiting on you to present to owner
